mapper.select: SELECT weather_id AS weatherId, device_id AS deviceId, fcst_date AS fcstDate, fcst_time AS fcstTime, sky_status AS skyStatus, rain_type AS rainType, rain_prob AS rainProb, temperature, humidity, wind_speed AS windSpeed, solar_radiation AS solarRadiation, ess_status AS essStatus, created_at AS createdAt, sunrise, sunset, base_date AS baseDate, base_time AS baseTime FROM weather_data WHERE device_id = #{device_id} ORDER BY created_at DESC, fcst_date DESC, fcst_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weather_data ( device_id, fcst_date, fcst_time, sky_status, rain_type, rain_prob, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, solar_radiation, ess_status, sunrise, sunset, base_date, base_time, created_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{fcstDate}, #{fcstTime}, #{skyStatus}, #{rainType}, #{rainProb}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{windSpeed}, #{solarRadiation}, #{essStatus}, #{sunrise}, #{sunset}, #{baseDate}, #{baseTime}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sky_status = VALUES(sky_status), rain_type = VALUES(rain_type), rain_prob = VALUES(rain_prob), temperature = VALUES(temperature), humidity = VALUES(humidity), wind_speed = VALUES(wind_speed), solar_radiation = VALUES(solar_radiation), ess_status = VALUES(ess_status), sunrise = VALUES(sunrise), sunset = VALUES(sunset), created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT weather_id AS weatherId, device_id AS deviceId, fcst_date AS fcstDate, fcst_time AS fcstTime, sky_status AS skyStatus, rain_type AS rainType, rain_prob AS rainProb, temperature AS temperature, humidity AS humidity, wind_speed AS windSpeed, solar_radiation AS solarRadiation, ess_status AS essStatus, created_at AS createdAt, sunrise AS sunrise, sunset AS sunset, base_date AS baseDate, base_time AS baseTime FROM weather_data WHERE device_id = #{device_id} AND CONCAT(fcst_date, fcst_time) >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') ORDER BY fcst_date ASC, fcst_time ASC LIMIT 8

SELECT weather_id AS weatherId, device_id AS deviceId, fcst_date AS fcstDate, fcst_time AS fcstTime, sky_status AS skyStatus, rain_type AS rainType, rain_prob AS rainProb, temperature AS temperature, humidity AS humidity, wind_speed AS windSpeed, solar_radiation AS solarRadiation, ess_status AS essStatus, created_at AS createdAt, sunrise AS sunrise, sunset AS sunset, base_date AS baseDate, base_time AS baseTime FROM weather_data WHERE device_id = #{device_id} AND CONCAT(fcst_date, fcst_time) >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') ORDER BY fcst_date ASC, fcst_time ASC LIMIT 1
